texto: For the first time X the truth is, I also couldn't bear to share you. I couldn't watch that happening,watch you with another man.I have gone too deep.Too deep with you. He kisses me again I love you, I love you more than I have ever loved any woman in my time on this earth.
explicacao: Citação de A.J. Molloy sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “For the first time X the truth is, I also couldn't bear to share you. I couldn't watch that happe…” articula amor, erotica, romance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como romance.
